bird.name: Little rock thrush
bird.summary: The little rock thrush (Monticola rufocinereus) is a species of passerine bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is found in Eritrea, Ethiopia…

relations.subject: Little rock thrush
relations.evidence: It is found in Eritrea, Ethiopia, Kenya, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Somalia, South Sudan, Tanzania, Uganda, and Yemen. It is found in rocky (inland cliffs and mountain peaks) areas with some trees, and sometimes near settlements.{{cite book |last1=Aerts |first1=R
relations.object_summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。
